name: Stuffed Onions
recipeIngredient: 6 Large Vidalia Onions or 8 medium yellow onions
2 tablespoons fresh marjoram, minced (used 1 teaspoon dried)
recipeInstructions:
Savory Wild Rice Stuffed Onions.
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cut off the root end of each onion and peel away any dry layers. Place onions, root-end down, in a baking dish and bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool and hollow out each onion, leaving about half an inch of shell (outermost 2-4 layers).
3. Chop 1 cup of the reserved onion and sauté with mushrooms in a medium hot pan for 3 minutes. Add garlic and apple, and sauté for another 3 minutes. Stir in parsley, marjoram, lemon juice, paprika, salt, and pepper. Combine this sautéed mixture with the cooked rice.
4. Fill each onion shell with the rice mixture. Pour enough stock into the bottom of the onions to cover about half an inch (approximately). Bake for 20 minutes, basting the stuffed onions occasionally with stock.
Makes 6-8 servings depending on the size of the onions used.
